title: 关系图谱信息图
description: Please generate a high-quality vertical "Popular Science Encyclopedia Image" based on {argument name="theme" default="animals"}. This image is not a regular poster or a simple illustration, but a modular popular science
prompt_raw:
Please generate a high-quality vertical "Popular Science Encyclopedia Image" based on {argument name="theme" default="animals"}.

This image is not a regular poster or a simple illustration, but a modular popular science infographic that possesses a sense of "illustration book, encyclopedia, information structure, and collectability." The overall style should reference a combination of high-end natural history illustrations, modern encyclopedia pages, lifestyle knowledge cards, and highly shareable social media infographics.

Please include in the frame:
- A clear and beautiful main visual of the subject
- Several magnified details of local characteristics
- Multiple rounded modular information sections
- Clear title hierarchies and key labels
- Concise yet rich encyclopedic content
- Visual ratings, key point summaries, or Top 5 modules

Content columns should be automatically adapted based on the theme, prioritized from these directions: basic profile, classification information, appearance characteristics, habits/ecology, formation mechanism/structure, growth or use conditions, care or maintenance suggestions, risks and precautions, suitable audience or scenarios, pros and cons comparison, and quick rating cards.

Visual requirements:
Light-colored clean background, soft color palette, light shadows, exquisite small icons, rounded information boxes, neat layout, high information density but not crowded, good reading experience. The overall result must look like a real science encyclopedia card suitable for publishing, reading, collecting, and serialized production, rather than an advertisement.

Please do not make it a regular commercial promotional poster. Highlight the features of "knowledge organization + modular information + illustration-style display."
prompt_preview: Please generate a high-quality vertical "Popular Science Encyclopedia Image" based on {argument name="theme" default="animals"}. This image is not a regular poster or a simple illustration, but a modular popular science
prompt_display_cn:
案例「Popular Science Encyclopedia Image」属于信息图/结构图。这是一张信息图/结构图类案例，重点不是单一画面主体，而是把主题内容拆成清晰模块，用标题、图标、箭头、分区、编号、标签和说明文字组织信息。适合改成知识科普、人物关系、流程图、城市地图、产品说明、攻略指南等高信息密度视觉。

原始提示词要点：这条案例原文以英文描述画面，需要转成中文展示版。它的主要内容包括：Please generate a high-quality vertical "Popular Science Encyclopedia Image" based on 【theme：animals】. This image is not a regular 海报 or a simple 插画, but a modular popular science 信息图 that possesses a sense of "插画 book, encyclopedia, information structure, and collectability." The overall 风格 should reference a combination of high-end natural history 插画s, modern encyclopedia pages, life风格 knowledge 卡片s, and highly shareable social media 信息图s. Please include in the frame: - A clear and beautiful main visual of the subject - Several magnified details of local 角色istics - Multiple rounded modular information sections - Clear 标题 hierarchies and key labels - Concise yet rich encyclopedic content - Visual ratings, key point summaries, or Top 5 modules Content columns should be automatically adapted based on the theme, prioritized from these directions: basic profile, classification information, appearance 角色istics, habits/ecology, formation mechanism/structure, growth or use conditions, care o
prompt_template_cn:
制作一张【主题】的信息图/结构图。

画面定位：
面向【目标读者】，用于【使用场景】，整体要求信息清楚、层级明确、视觉有吸引力。

主体内容：
以【核心对象/中心主题】为视觉中心，周围分成【模块数量】个信息模块，分别展示【模块1】、【模块2】、【模块3】、【模块4】等内容。

版式结构：
采用【版式结构】，使用清晰的标题区、分区框、箭头连线、编号标签、图标和简短说明文字组织信息。重要内容要突出，次要内容保持整齐。

视觉风格：
整体风格为【视觉风格】，背景为【背景样式】，配色使用【主色调】，图形元素保持统一。

文字要求：
所有需要显示的文字使用【文字语言】，标题和标签清晰可读，避免乱码、错字和过度拥挤。

输出要求：
画面比例为【画面比例】，适合用于【发布渠道/用途】。
